description: Design a precision V-Block jig in FreeCAD with a 60mm x 60mm x 40mm rectangular base. The block must feature a 90-degree V-groove on the top face (Z=40) centered on X=0 and running along the Y-axis, with the bottom vertex at Z=28mm. Include two rectangular clamping slots on the X-min and X-max faces, running along the Y-axis, each 12mm high (centered at Z=20mm) and 4mm deep. Save the final model to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/v_block.FCStd.
